lastSummary: Scanned Lane B ViewModels and lane-B UI/navigation/component files (ContentView; Detail/Discover/Downloads/Library/Search/Navigation windows; MediaCardView) on commit 38e5a2dfb5c90869199fb7da5f9568c944da441e. findings.title: DownloadsViewModel.playFile uses potentially stale mediaTitle from DownloadTask
LibraryView fallback preview hard-codes unknown items as movies, breaking TV detail routing
Search silently shows empty results when TMDB is unconfigured instead of surfacing a setup error
Search year-range presets (2020s/2010s/Classic) apply only a single year
Search language filter UI allows multi-select but only one language is actually applied
Search filter sheet Cancel action does not cancel sort/genre changes
Clearing Search filters leaves stale mood-card context active and traps Explore in results mode
Detail torrent rows can remain stuck in Downloaded state after the download is removed
Detail layout hides the streams section whenever search returns zero results
Detail download-state badges reset to idle after reopening a title
LibraryCSVExportSheet.encodeCSV crashes when history is accessed before being loaded
Navigation badges can never appear because ContentView never passes non-zero badge counts
LibraryView can render stale list/folder data after rapid selection changes because cancelled loads still mutate state
Left-sidebar navigation drops the Environments tab on non-visionOS, creating layout-dependent tab access
Rapid season switches can show episodes from the wrong season because stale loadSeason calls still overwrite state
Stream-open failures are hidden because torrent-row error UI only renders while player launch is in progress
